state.next-action:
Phase 34 shipped. Phase 36 spec drafted at .planning/specs/PER-EVAL-REPO-SPEC.md.
=== JUST DRAFTED (spec only, no code yet) === Phase 36: Per-eval-repo architecture + gad eval start/auto/finish split + gad env Spec: .planning/specs/PER-EVAL-REPO-SPEC.md Decisions: GAD-D-139 through GAD-D-143 - GAD-D-139: One GitHub repo per eval project, runs as round-N/vM/ directories - GAD-D-140: Split gad eval run into start/auto/finish (run becomes deprecated alias) - GAD-D-141: Deprecate gad eval suite in favor of gad project run-round (phase 37) - GAD-D-142: Skill tracking is GAD-workflow-only, trace-active-skill hook is dead code - GAD-D-143: gad env status / gad env agents for runtime availability checks
Phase 37 added to roadmap: gad project top-level command (depends on 36).
=== PHASE ORDER === 35 (planned) - Cross-runtime identity + telemetry attribution (needs its own planning) 36 (planned) - Per-eval-repo architecture (spec ready, needs plan-phase + execute-phase) 37 (planned) - gad project top-level command (depends on 36)
=== NEXT === 1. Run gad:plan-phase 36 to create the executable PLAN.md from the spec 2. Execute phase 36 via gad:execute-phase 3. Phase 35 can parallel if scoped to runtime identity only (the TRACE fields 36 consumes)
